name: libnss3-dev
title: libnss3-dev
summary: Development files for the Network Security Service libraries
description:
Development files for the Network Security Service libraries
This is a set of libraries designed to support cross-platform development
of security-enabled client and server applications. It can support SSLv2
and  v4, TLS, PKCS #5, #7, #11, #12, S/MIME, X.509 v3 certificates and
other security standards.
.
Install this package if you wish to develop your own programs using the
Network Security Service Libraries.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for nss-config.
arguments.raw: -config  Option present in package usage line for nss-config.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use nss-config because Development files for the Network Security Service libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use nss-config as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nss-config [options] [args]` as documented upstream for nss-config.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair nss-config with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `nss-config --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -config
arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for nss-config.
